overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character exits an indoor corridor onto a vibrant street with colorful overhead decorations, then turns into a narrow graffiti-covered back alley leading to a service door.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor pedestrian corridor with yellow structural beams

events.description: approaching glass exit doors with bright outdoor light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through an indoor corridor toward the exit, passing potted plants and debris scattered on the floor

entered.detail: bright yellow support beams crossing the ceiling
large green plants in containers along the left wall
scattered trash and papers littering the dark floor
large glass doors leading to the outside street
long white fluorescent light strips on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking through an indoor corridor with distinctive yellow structural beams and fluorescent lighting. The floor is littered with debris and potted plants line the left side. The camera approaches a glass exit door leading to the bright outdoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with holographic advertisements and colorful overhead spiral decorations

events.description: exits building into bright outdoor urban environment with direct sunlight
pedestrian with purple hair and white jacket walks past on the sidewalk
continues walking straight along the street under colorful overhead decorations

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk, observing the colorful overhead decorations and passing vehicles on the street

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair and white jacket walking toward the camera
yellow sports car driving along the street

entered.detail: vibrant rainbow-colored circular fabric decorations hanging overhead across the street
large digital advertisement screens showing animated characters
concrete overpass structure running parallel to the street
tall glass and steel buildings with neon accents in the background
tall orange traffic poles with signs and lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building onto a vibrant futuristic city street bathed in sunlight. Colorful spiral decorations hang overhead between towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. The player walks along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles driving on the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with dumpsters, graffiti, and trash leading to a service door

events.description: turns left from main street into narrow alleyway between buildings
approaches metal stairs leading up to a teal service door at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alley filled with trash and graffiti, walking toward a service door at the end

notable_agents.action: person standing near the dumpsters in the distance

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and street art
large green and black metal trash containers lining the alley
cardboard, paper, and debris littering the alley floor
concrete steps leading up to a platform with a door
metal door painted teal with yellow warning text
stacked cardboard boxes next to the dumpsters

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a narrow back alleyway filled with dumpsters, scattered trash, and graffiti-covered walls. The colorful decorations are still visible overhead but the environment is more enclosed and gritty. The player walks toward a set of metal stairs leading to a teal service door at the end of the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile indoor corridor into a vibrant futuristic city street before descending into a gritty urban alleyway. It begins by moving through a hallway defined by yellow structural beams and fluorescent lighting, passing debris and potted plants toward a glass exit. As the camera steps outside, the environment opens into a sun-drenched metropolis where towering skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and colorful spiral decorations fill the skyline above a busy road of pedestrians and vehicles. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, leaving the bright main thoroughfare for a narrow, enclosed back alley characterized by graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. Finally, the movement continues past dumpsters and under the lingering overhead decorations toward a set of metal stairs and a teal service door.
